column1: # When a dissolving authoring card's non-boilerplate token is reworded away by
# the merge (a faithful synonym swap, not a lost rule), it shows as uncovered in
# audit-merge-coverage.sh. Such a token may be CLEARED here — but ONLY with an
# Indy ack-quote (per the deferral-discipline rule). The merging agent may NOT
# author its own drop justification: a line whose ack field does not match the
# Indy-ack format (`Indy (YYYY-MM-DD): "<quote>"`) is rejected and the audit
# fails. This keeps "intentionally dropped" honest rather than agent self-served.
# A token cleared here is treated as covered for EVERY card (the rewording is
# global). One token per line. Empty at Stage 0 — populated at the Stage-2
# deletion boundary once Indy adjudicates the uncovered-token report.
